reason: Successfully verified agent functionality: Agent used GitHub tool to check authenticated user and returned the GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents including "QA-20260419-123512-jwxk" with idle status
Found and clicked the "QA-20260419-123512-jwxk" agent in the sidebar - agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - agent status displayed as "idle" in the header and sidebar
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - message sent successfully and agent began processing
GitHub account access request card appeared - card displayed with GitHub account already selected and ready to grant
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access - access granted and agent continued processing
API request permission dialog appeared asking to allow "Get the authenticated user" - clicked "Allow Once" to proceed
Waited for agent response - agent completed work in 40 seconds with status returning to "idle"
Verified response includes GitHub username - agent successfully returned "Your GitHub username is yiw190." in the chat
Took screenshot of verification result - screenshot saved showing the complete conversation with the GitHub username clearly visible
